channel.title: Entry-Level Jobs on After the Grind
channel.description: Recent content in Entry-Level Jobs on After the Grind

item.title: The Entry Point Moved
item.description: The Class of 2026 is stepping into a job market that was quietly redesigned while they were in school. The bottom rung of the white-collar career ladder has been automated away. Here’s what that actually means, and what survives.

item.title: The Vanishing First Rung
item.description: Tech companies cut 59,000 jobs in three months while posting record revenues. BlackRock’s CEO worries about the class of 2026. The entry-level job ladder is disappearing. Here’s what that actually means.
